text: 595 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَكْبَرُ مَا يَكُونُ اَلْإِنْسَانُ يَوْمَ يُولَدُ وَ أَصْغَرُ مَا يَكُونُ يَوْمَ يَمُوتُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.595 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The largest (in purity) a person is, is on the day they are born, and the smallest (in purity) they are, is on the day they die”.
